sayings.coptic: Ⲡⲉϫⲉ Ⲡⲉⲭⲥ ⲛⲁϥ ϫⲉ ⲛⲉⲓⲥϫⲉ ⲉⲧⲉⲧⲛⲛⲁϫⲓⲟⲩⲧ ϫⲉ ⲙⲏ ⲛⲉⲧⲙⲟⲩ
sayings.transliteration: Peje PechS naf je: Neisje etetnnajioUt je: Mē netmou
sayings.translation_en: Jesus said: These are the secret words which the living Jesus spoke

sayings.coptic: Ⲡⲉϫⲉ Ⲡⲉⲭⲥ ϫⲉ ⲉⲧⲉⲧⲛⲛⲁⲉⲓ ⲉⲃⲟⲗ ϩⲓⲧⲙ ⲡⲏⲏⲣⲉ
sayings.transliteration: Peje PechS je: Etetnnaei ebol hitm pēēre
sayings.translation_en: Jesus said: Let him who seeks not cease seeking until he finds

sayings.coptic: Ⲡⲉϫⲉ Ⲡⲉⲭⲥ ϫⲉ ⲉⲛⲉⲧⲉⲧⲛⲉⲓⲟⲩ ⲉⲃⲟⲗ ϩⲓⲧⲙ ⲛⲏⲧⲛ
sayings.transliteration: Peje PechS je: EnetetneioU ebol hitm nētn
sayings.translation_en: Jesus said: If those who lead you say the Kingdom is in heaven, the birds will precede you

sayings.coptic: Ⲡⲉϫⲉ Ⲡⲉⲭⲥ ϫⲉ ⲡⲉⲧⲛⲛⲁⲉⲓ ⲉⲃⲟⲗ ϩⲓⲧⲙ ⲡⲏⲏⲣⲉ ⲛⲁⲙⲱⲧ
sayings.transliteration: Peje PechS je: Petetnnaei ebol hitm pēēre namōt
sayings.translation_en: Jesus said: The man old in days will not hesitate to ask a little child seven days old about the place of life

sayings.coptic: Ⲡⲉϫⲉ Ⲡⲉⲭⲥ ϫⲉ ⲉⲧⲉⲧⲛⲛⲁⲥⲟⲟⲩⲛ ⲉⲃⲟⲗ ϩⲓⲧⲙ ⲡⲏⲏⲣⲉ
sayings.transliteration: Peje PechS je: Etetetnnasoun ebol hitm pēēre
sayings.translation_en: Jesus said: Know what is before your face, and what is hidden will be revealed to you

sayings.coptic: Ⲡⲉϫⲉ Ⲡⲉⲭⲥ ϫⲉ ⲛⲉⲧⲃⲱⲕ ⲉⲃⲟⲗ ϩⲓⲧⲙ ⲡⲏⲏⲣⲉ ⲛⲁⲧⲁⲙⲟ
sayings.transliteration: Peje PechS je: Netbōk ebol hitm pēēre natamo
sayings.translation_en: Jesus said: Blessed is the man who has suffered and found life

sayings.coptic: Ⲡⲉϫⲉ Ⲡⲉⲭⲥ ϫⲉ ⲧⲁⲙⲉ ⲉⲃⲟⲗ ϩⲓⲧⲙ ⲡⲏⲏⲣⲉ
sayings.transliteration: Peje PechS je: Tame ebol hitm pēēre
sayings.translation_en: Jesus said: Blessed is the lion which the man shall eat, so that the lion becomes man

sayings.coptic: Ⲡⲉϫⲉ Ⲡⲉⲭⲥ ϫⲉ ⲡⲉⲧⲛⲛⲁⲉⲓ ⲉⲃⲟⲗ ϩⲓⲧⲙ ⲡⲏⲏⲣⲉ ⲛⲁⲙⲱⲧ
sayings.transliteration: Peje PechS je: Petetnnaei ebol hitm pēēre namōt
sayings.translation_en: Jesus said: The Kingdom is like a wise fisherman who cast his net into the sea

passages.translation_en: The Gospel of Truth is joy for those who have received grace

passages.coptic: Ⲛⲉⲧⲉⲣⲉ ⲡⲉⲭⲥ ⲉⲓ ⲉⲃⲟⲗ ϩⲓⲧⲙ ⲡⲏⲏⲣⲉ
passages.transliteration: NeterE PechS ei ebol hitm pēēre
passages.translation_en: When Jesus came forth from the Father
You will know from the beginning
The Secret Book of John, the teaching of the Savior
You will know from the Father
